title: phlox austromontana subsp. jonesii
intro: Phlox austromontana subsp. jonesii is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae, native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Phlox austromontana subsp. jonesii is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and may help to prevent infections due to its antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are not well-documented, but it is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine, typically dried or used in teas.
